# Giovanni Village Resort

> A luxury jungle resort and premier celebration destination near Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India.

## Overview

Giovanni Village Resort is a premium nature-luxury resort located on Kerwa Dam Road, near Kerwa Dam, on the peaceful outskirts of Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The resort combines refined hospitality with a serene forest setting, offering luxury stays, grand weddings, social celebrations, corporate events, spa and wellness, curated dining, and nature-led experiences.

## Key Facts

- Location: Kerwa Dam Road, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh 462044, India
- Distance from Bhopal city centre: ~15 km (30-minute drive)
- Distance from Raja Bhoj Airport: ~25 km (45-minute drive)
- Check-in: 2:00 PM | Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Currency: INR (Indian Rupees)
- Contact: +91 755 000 0000
- Email: stay@giovanniresort.com
- Website: https://giovanniresort.com

## Accommodation

Giovanni Village Resort offers four room categories:

1. **Superior Room** – 320 sq ft, garden view, king/twin beds, from ₹5,999/night
2. **Deluxe Room** – 420 sq ft, forest view, king bed, soaking bathtub, from ₹7,999/night
3. **Premium Suite** – 680 sq ft, panoramic forest view, separate living area, personal concierge, from ₹14,999/night
4. **Family Cottage** – 800 sq ft, two bedrooms, private garden, from ₹12,999/night

All rooms include complimentary breakfast, Wi-Fi, and pool access.

## Dining

- **Terra** – All-day dining restaurant (Indian, Continental, Asian), 7 AM – 10:30 PM
- **Forest Grill** – Open-air specialty grill and tandoor, dinner only, 7 PM – 10:30 PM (reservation recommended)
- **The Verandah Lounge** – Cocktails, teas, light bites, 10 AM – 11 PM
- 24-hour room service available

## Events & Celebrations

Giovanni Village Resort is a premier celebration destination with four event venues:

1. **The Grand Lawn** – 15,000 sq ft outdoor venue, up to 1,000 guests, ideal for weddings
2. **The Forest Terrace** – Covered outdoor venue, up to 200 guests, ideal for intimate celebrations
3. **The Banquet Hall** – 5,000 sq ft climate-controlled indoor venue, up to 400 guests, ideal for conferences and receptions
4. **The Poolside Deck** – 2,000 sq ft outdoor deck, up to 150 guests, ideal for cocktail parties

Event types hosted: weddings, receptions, engagement ceremonies, sangeet, mehndi, haldi, birthdays, anniversaries, cocktail evenings, corporate conferences, team offsites, family gatherings.

In-house catering with vegetarian, non-vegetarian, and mixed menu options across standard, premium, and luxury tiers.

## Experiences

- Spa & Wellness (Ayurvedic and contemporary treatments)
- Guided Nature Trails (sunrise and sunset)
- Swimming Pool (children's section available)
- Bonfire & Stargazing evenings
- Resort Cycling
- Kids' Activity Zone

## Nearby Attractions

- Kerwa Dam
- Van Vihar National Park
- Upper Lake (Bada Talab)
- Bharat Bhavan
- Tribal Museum (Manav Sangrahalaya)
- Bhimbetka Rock Shelters (UNESCO World Heritage Site)
- Sanchi Stupa
